creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Importance: affects some people.

From <https://mail-archive.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?be9146d1-a895-4e52-91c1-85186bb86cbe> | <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2024-December/007016.html> (2024-12-15): 

> CFT: repository for kernel modules: from .1401000 to .1402000 with kmods_latest_2

> … In both cases, an upgrade without specifying '-r FreeBSD-kmods' did 
> not gain packages from the repo: …

For users of FreeBSD Discord: some discussion at and around <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/760416312676712519/1322841404623294585> (2024-12-29), and I have created a thread at <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/1322832644442165259> with reference to this bug 283755.
